stocks.impact_theory: Argan reported stellar Q4 FY2026 earnings with EPS of $3.47 beating estimates by 74%, revenue slightly miss but record $2.9B backlog (+114% YoY) driven by natural gas power plants for AI data centers. Economic implications: Surge in AI infrastructure demand boosts construction for energy needs. Market psychology: Shift from broad market fear (war/oil) to AI/power play enthusiasm. Historical parallels: Similar to 2021 infrastructure boom post-COVID stimulus. Analogies: 1. Pick-and-shovel gold rush (power for AI gold). 2. Like building railroads for internet boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat and massive backlog signal strong growth; X sentiment highly positive on AI tie-in; web news highlights surge despite market volatility. Potential retest of 52w high.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +10-15% gains on AI hype continuation and analyst upgrades (JPM $550).
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky post-earnings run-up; potential -5% on profit-taking.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution on large backlog, insider selling, high valuation (58x P/E), market sell-off.

stocks.justification: Concrete earnings catalyst with AI relevance amid positive X buzz and multiple upgrades.

stocks.impact_theory: $29.1B acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot announced, expanding cash-and-carry but raising debt load and dilution fears. Economic: Consolidation in food wholesale amid inflation. Psychology: Initial euphoria turned panic sell-off. Parallels: AOL-Time Warner debt overload. Analogies: 1. Overpaying for growth like WeWork. 2. Leverage bomb in rising rates era.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Massive deal sparks debt concerns (high volume confirms); no X data but web highlights plunge while market up. Near 52w low.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long risky; wait for stabilization +5% rebound.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for additional -5-8% on integration fears.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal synergies materialize faster, defensive staple resilience.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst but acquisition outcomes uncertain; high volume supports sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Wolfe Research upgrade to Outperform with $450 PT amid cybersecurity demand. Implications: Steady enterprise spend despite macro fears. Psychology: Relief in tech correction. Parallels: Post-2022 cyber boom. Analogies: 1. Vaccine stocks in pandemic. 2. Cloud upgrades in 2020.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Upgrade counters tech weakness; recent Q4 ARR growth strong. Positive analyst sentiment.

stocks.justification: Analyst upgrade solid but in volatile tech sector.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran strikes disrupt Gulf aluminum smelters, boosting prices/supply fears. Implications: Commodity rally on geopolitics. Psychology: Flight to materials amid war. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine aluminum spikes. Analogies: 1. Oil on OPEC cuts. 2. Wheat on Black Sea blockade.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Geopolitical supply shock; news headlines confirm rally with peers like CENX.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +10% to 52w high on sustained tensions.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick resolution to conflict, demand slowdown.

stocks.justification: Strong news flow but geo events volatile.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surges on Iran war escalation, Trump hints at talks but tensions persist. Implications: Higher energy prices boost majors. Psychology: Rotation to energy safety. Parallels: 2014-15 oil boom. Analogies: 1. Defense stocks in wars. 2. Gold in uncertainty.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil price tailwind; headlines link to helium/oil gains.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +5% near-term on crude rally.

stocks.justification: Clear macro driver with strong fundamentals/dividend.
